isolated.reason: Passes alone but flakes in the shared fork lane; keep it in a dedicated fork worker.

forkBatched.reason: Retained ~318 MiB in an isolated memory trace and is safer outside the shared unit-fast lane.
Secrets runtime coverage retained the largest unit-fast heap spike in CI and is safer outside the shared lane.
Memory index coverage retained nearly 1 GiB in unit-fast on Linux CI and is safer in its own fork.
Plugin HTTP registry coverage retained a broad plugin graph in unit-fast and is safer outside the shared lane.
Channel summary coverage retained a large channel/plugin graph in unit-fast on Linux CI.
Snapshot redaction coverage produced a large retained heap jump in unit-fast on Linux CI.
Snapshot restore coverage retains a broad schema/redaction graph and is safer outside the shared lane.
Schema-backed redaction round-trip coverage loads the full config schema graph and is safer outside the shared lane.
Plugin SDK index coverage retained a broad export graph in unit-fast and is safer outside the shared lane.
Plugin SDK bundle validation builds and imports the full bundled export graph and is safer outside the shared lane.
Secrets runtime coverage tests retained substantial heap in unit-fast and are safer isolated.
Plugin contract registry coverage retained a large cross-plugin graph in both failing unit-fast shards.
TUI command handler coverage retained a top shared unit-fast heap spike in the March 20, 2026 Linux Node 24 shard 2 OOM lane.
Missing from unit timings and retained the largest shared unit-fast heap spike in the March 20, 2026 Linux Node 24 shard 1 OOM lane.
Missing from unit timings and retained a top shared unit-fast heap spike in the March 20, 2026 Linux Node 24 shard 2 OOM lane.
